articles.title: Bitcoin and Ether Falter as Cardano, Solana, Shiba Inu Brace for Big Fed Rate Hikes
articles.description: The crypto market in recent months has become increasingly sensitive to rate hikes by the Fed. This week's expectations of even more aggressive rate hikes have seen several altcoins slip considerably in the past 48 hours.
